title: PlasPak
description: Better performance and all-around quality of life modpack.
body:
![Stunning built-in shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKaP6ngr/images/87d0bdb8bede0be8fa6587fb01f805036bdf646f.png)
Comes with shaders!

## Overview
PlasPak is a modpack designed to optimise your Minecraft experience, from performance optimisations that triple your FPS compared to vanilla Minecraft, to Quality of Life changes like item lookups, better advancements and more! PlasPak also has support for proximity voice chat, so you can chat to your friends without opening Discord! Furthermore, PlasPak offers the ability to make your game look stunning, with unlimited shader support at your fingertips.

PlasPak is also compatible server-side!

## Why should you install PlasPak?
PlasPak offers a completely different experience of Minecraft in comparison with vanilla. No more frame stutters, FPS drops and a completely dull looking game. With PlasPak you can fix all these things with its countless performance optimisations and quality of life changes that won't have you looking back!

## Authors
- MrDrakify
- Waffle
- Included contributing mod developers
